drug_name: CVS PHARMACY Childrens Cold and Allergy
active_ingredients: Active Ingredients (in each 10 mL) Brompheniramine maleate, USP 2 mg
indications_and_usage: Uses temporarily relieves: runny nose sneezing itchy, watery eyes due to hay fever itching of the nose or throat
dosage_and_administration: Directions do not take more than 6 doses in any 24-hour period measure only with dosage cup provided keep dosage cup with product ml = milliliter age Dose adults and children 12 years and over 20 ml every 4 hours children 6 to under 12 years 10 ml every 4 hours children under 6 years do not use
